title: metastelma calcicola
intro: Metastelma calcicola, also known as the climbing milkweed vine, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Metastelma calcicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
